Notes.Text:
This update for giflib fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2026-23868: double-free result of a shallow copy can lead to memory corruption (bsc#1259502).

Vulnerabilities.Description: giflib v5.2.1 was discovered to contain a segmentation fault via the component getarg.c.

Vulnerabilities.Description: Giflib contains a double-free vulnerability that is the result of a shallow copy in GifMakeSavedImage and incorrect error handling. The conditions needed to trigger this vulnerability are difficult but may be possible.

ProductID: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server LTSS Extended Security 12 SP5:giflib-devel-5.0.6-13.12.1
